payload.title: [LOW] LAN sync push: no actor authz, no workspace-key binding
payload.description: Local /api/sync/push (server.js:838) runs authorizeUploadActors only if hostedAuth; LAN path accepts any actor + writes to any workspace id with no key match. Any paired peer / shared-token holder forges attributed history into any board. Partly by design (trusted LAN set, ADR 0003 5) but coarse; widens the path-traversal blast radius. FIX: lightweight actor sanity + workspace-key binding even on LAN.
